facts.label: PAY DISPUTE, WORLD STAGE
facts.story: Togo arrived in Germany mid-crisis: head coach Otto Pfister resigned three days before the opener over unpaid bonuses, then returned only after players pleaded with him. Days later, the squad threatened to boycott the Switzerland match entirely, holding out for promised bonuses the federation hadn't paid. FIFA stepped in to broker a deal on 17 June, and the players reluctantly boarded a bus to Dortmund just in time to take the field.

facts.label: LES ÉPERVIERS
facts.story: Togo's players are Les Éperviers, the Sparrow Hawks, and their Puma-made 2006 kit carried a stitched eagle emblem across the chest above a bright yellow shirt with green trim, colors lifted straight from the national flag. Wearing number 4 that summer was a 22-year-old striker named Emmanuel Adebayor, years before Arsenal, Manchester City, Real Madrid and Tottenham made him one of Africa's most recognizable forwards.

2006.headline: One Goal, Total Chaos

annotations.label: TOGO'S ONLY GOAL EVER
annotations.story: In the 31st minute in Frankfurt, Mohamed Kader controlled a ball over the top, cut into the box and drilled a low shot inside the near post past Lee Woon-jae — Togo's first-ever World Cup goal, and still their only one. South Korea replied twice in the second half to snatch a 2–1 win.

annotations.label: BLANKED IN DORTMUND
annotations.story: Amid the bonus standoff that nearly saw Togo boycott the match, the Sparrow Hawks arrived in Dortmund distracted and were shut out 2–0 by a Swiss side that would finish the group stage without conceding a single goal.

annotations.label: OUTCLASSED BY LES BLEUS
annotations.story: With Zinedine Zidane suspended, France still needed only routine finishes from Patrick Vieira and Thierry Henry to beat Togo 2–0 in Cologne, closing a chaotic debut tournament for the Sparrow Hawks, who left Germany with one goal and no points.

2006.homeColors: bright yellow shirt with green trim and a stitched eagle emblem on the chest (Puma)
2006.awayColors: white shirt with yellow and green trim (Puma)
